words.def: a structure in which animals lay eggs or give birth to their young
words.zh: n. 巢, 窩, 休息所, 隱匿處

words.def: the cardinal number that is the sum of nine and one; the base of the decimal system
a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
